title: Cooling with Outside Air
full_text:
8.4.4.12 Cooling with Outside Air
Cooling with Outside Air
1) Where Article 5.2.2.7. applies to a proposed building's HVAC system, the HVAC
systems of the corresponding thermal blocks in the reference building shall be modeled
in accordance with that Article and Table 8.4.4.12.
Table 8.4.4.12.
Applicable Requirements for Cooling with Outside Air According to Type of HVAC System
Forming Part of Sentence 8.4.4.12.(1)
Type of System
Applicable Article for Cooling with Outside Air
HVAC systems 1, 3, 4 and 6(1)
HVAC systems 2 and 5(1)
All types of heat pump systems(2)
5.2.2.8.
5.2.2.9.

sentences.text: Where Article 5.2.2.7. applies to a proposed building's HVAC system, the HVAC systems of the corresponding thermal blocks in the reference building shall be modeled in accordance with that Article and Table 8.4.4.12. Table 8.4.4.12. Applicable Requirements for Cooling with Outside Air According to Type of HVAC System Forming Part of Sentence 8.4.4.12.(1) Type of System Applicable Article for Cooling with Outside Air HVAC systems 1, 3, 4 and 6(1) HVAC systems 2 and 5(1) All types of heat pump systems(2) 5.2.2.8. 5.2.2.9.
